## Checklist
<!-- Mark completed items with an "x" -->

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have removed any console.logs and debugging code

### Testing
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have tested on multiple browsers (if frontend change)
- [ ] I have tested on mobile devices (if UI change)

### Documentation
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] I have updated the README.md (if needed)
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG.md
- [ ] I have added JSDoc comments for new functions

### Dependencies
- [ ] I have not added unnecessary dependencies
- [ ] All new dependencies are properly documented
- [ ] I have updated package.json versions (if needed)

### Security
- [ ] My changes don't introduce security vulnerabilities
- [ ] I have validated all user inputs
- [ ] I have not exposed sensitive information
- [ ] I have followed security best practices
